code_prompt_defaults.object_description_midgame_board: a Connect Four board in a midgame position with red and yellow discs
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_crowded_board: a Connect Four board in a crowded late-game position with red and yellow discs
code_prompt_defaults.legal_drop_rule_text: A legal drop chooses one non-full column and lands in its lowest empty square.
code_prompt_defaults.winning_rule_text: A horizontal, vertical, or diagonal line of four matching discs wins.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_winning_move_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space cell boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every immediate-winning landing square
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_winning_move_column_labe: set "annotation" to one point [x, y] at the center of the landing square in the selected winning column
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_blocking_move_column_lab: set "annotation" to one point [x, y] at the center of the landing square in the selected blocking column
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_column_disc_profile_labe: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space cell boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the occupied cells in the selected column
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_winning_move_count: set "answer" to the number of legal drop columns that win immediately
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_winning_move_column_label: set "answer" to the selected column label as a capital letter shown below the board
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_blocking_move_column_label: set "answer" to the selected column label as a capital letter shown below the board
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_column_disc_profile_label: set "answer" to the selected column label as a capital letter shown below the board
